name: Brave Web Search Skill
description: Performs high-fidelity web search queries via the Brave Search API to extract real-time news, narrative trend signals, and sentiment for active prediction events.

tools.name: search_brave_web
tools.description: Queries the web for live articles, news reports, and events relevant to prediction markets.

query.description: The search query string, e.g. 'Solana ETF approval chances 2026'.

count.description: Maximum number of search results to return.
